  • Method Details

    • listScheduleSummaries

      public TransferScheduleSummariesListScheduleSummariesRequestBuilder listScheduleSummaries()
      List Schedule Summaries

      Lists transfer schedule summaries that match the filter in the request

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • listScheduleSummariesDirect

      public TransferScheduleSummariesListScheduleSummariesResponse listScheduleSummariesDirect() throws Exception
      List Schedule Summaries

      Lists transfer schedule summaries that match the filter in the request

      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listScheduleSummaries

      public TransferScheduleSummariesListScheduleSummariesResponse listScheduleSummaries(Optional<String> filter, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Schedule Summaries

      Lists transfer schedule summaries that match the filter in the request

      Parameters:
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information; Filter options include: `account` `mechanism` `direction` `state` `start_date` `end_date`
      pageSize - The maximum number of schedules to return. The service may return fewer than this value. If unspecified, at most 25 schedules will be returned. The maximum value is 1000; values above 1000 will be coerced to 1000.
      pageToken - The page token to request
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • createAchDepositSchedule

      public AchDepositSchedulesCreateAchDepositScheduleRequestBuilder createAchDepositSchedule()
      Create ACH Deposit Schedule

      Creates an ACH deposit transfer schedule

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • createAchDepositSchedule

      public AchDepositSchedulesCreateAchDepositScheduleResponse createAchDepositSchedule(String accountId, AchDepositScheduleCreate achDepositScheduleCreate) throws Exception
      Create ACH Deposit Schedule

      Creates an ACH deposit transfer schedule

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      achDepositScheduleCreate - A deposit transfer schedule using the ACH mechanism
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      options - additional options

    • listAchDepositSchedules

      public AchDepositSchedulesListAchDepositSchedulesResponse listAchDepositSchedules(String accountId, Optional<String> filter, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List ACH Deposit Schedules

      Return a list of ACH deposit schedules for the specified account and filter params

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information; Filter options include: `state` `start_date` `end_date`
      pageSize - The maximum number of schedules to return. The service may return fewer than this value. If unspecified, at most 25 schedules will be returned. The maximum value is 1000; values above 1000 will be coerced to 1000.
      pageToken - The page token to request
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • updateAchDepositSchedule

      public AchDepositSchedulesUpdateAchDepositScheduleResponse updateAchDepositSchedule(String accountId, String achDepositScheduleId, AchDepositScheduleUpdate achDepositScheduleUpdate) throws Exception
      Update ACH Deposit Schedules

      Updates the amount of an ACH deposit transfer schedule

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      achDepositScheduleId - The achDepositSchedule id.
      achDepositScheduleUpdate - A deposit transfer schedule using the ACH mechanism
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • updateAchDepositSchedule

      public AchDepositSchedulesUpdateAchDepositScheduleResponse updateAchDepositSchedule(String accountId, String achDepositScheduleId, Optional<String> updateMask, AchDepositScheduleUpdate achDepositScheduleUpdate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Update ACH Deposit Schedules

      Updates the amount of an ACH deposit transfer schedule

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      achDepositScheduleId - The achDepositSchedule id.
      updateMask - A field mask representing the update. Note: only the 'schedule_details.amount' field of a schedule is currently updatable
      achDepositScheduleUpdate - A deposit transfer schedule using the ACH mechanism
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      public AchWithdrawalSchedulesListAchWithdrawalSchedulesResponse listAchWithdrawalSchedules(String accountId, Optional<String> filter, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List ACH Withdrawal Schedules

      Return a list of ACH withdrawal schedules for the specified account and filter params

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information; Filter options include: `state` `start_date` `end_date`
      pageSize - The maximum number of schedules to return. The service may return fewer than this value. If unspecified, at most 25 schedules will be returned. The maximum value is 1000; values above 1000 will be coerced to 1000.
      pageToken - The page token to request
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • updateAchWithdrawalSchedule

      public AchWithdrawalSchedulesUpdateAchWithdrawalScheduleResponse updateAchWithdrawalSchedule(String accountId, String achWithdrawalScheduleId, Optional<String> updateMask, AchWithdrawalScheduleUpdate achWithdrawalScheduleUpdate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Update ACH Withdrawal Schedule

      Updates the amount of an ACH withdrawal transfer schedule

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      achWithdrawalScheduleId - The achWithdrawalSchedule id.
      updateMask - A field mask representing the update. Note: only the 'schedule_details.amount' field of a schedule is currently updatable
      achWithdrawalScheduleUpdate - A withdrawal transfer schedule using the ACH mechanism
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      Exception - if the API call fails

    • cancelAchWithdrawalSchedule

      public AchWithdrawalSchedulesCancelAchWithdrawalScheduleResponse cancelAchWithdrawalSchedule(String accountId, String achWithdrawalScheduleId, CancelAchWithdrawalScheduleRequestCreate cancelAchWithdrawalScheduleRequestCreate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Cancel ACH Withdrawal Schedule

      Cancels an ACH withdrawal transfer schedule

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      achWithdrawalScheduleId - The achWithdrawalSchedule id.
      cancelAchWithdrawalScheduleRequestCreate - Request to cancel an ACH withdrawal transfer schedule
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      The response from the API call

      public CheckWithdrawalSchedulesListCheckWithdrawalSchedulesRequestBuilder listCheckWithdrawalSchedules()
      List Check Withdrawal Schedules

      Return a list of Check withdrawal schedules for the specified account and filter params

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • listCheckWithdrawalSchedules

      public CheckWithdrawalSchedulesListCheckWithdrawalSchedulesResponse listCheckWithdrawalSchedules(String accountId) throws Exception
      List Check Withdrawal Schedules

      Return a list of Check withdrawal schedules for the specified account and filter params

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • listCheckWithdrawalSchedules

      public CheckWithdrawalSchedulesListCheckWithdrawalSchedulesResponse listCheckWithdrawalSchedules(String accountId, Optional<String> filter, Optional<Integer> pageSize, Optional<String> pageToken, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      List Check Withdrawal Schedules

      Return a list of Check withdrawal schedules for the specified account and filter params

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information; Filter options include: `state` `start_date` `end_date`
      pageSize - The maximum number of schedules to return. The service may return fewer than this value. If unspecified, at most 25 schedules will be returned. The maximum value is 1000; values above 1000 will be coerced to 1000.
      pageToken - The page token to request
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • getCheckWithdrawalSchedule

      public CheckWithdrawalSchedulesGetCheckWithdrawalScheduleRequestBuilder getCheckWithdrawalSchedule()
      Get Check Withdrawal Schedule

      Gets a Check withdrawal transfer schedule

      Returns:
      The call builder

      checkWithdrawalScheduleId - The checkWithdrawalSchedule id.

      Update Check Withdrawal Schedule

      Updates the amount of a Check withdrawal transfer schedule

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      checkWithdrawalScheduleId - The checkWithdrawalSchedule id.
      checkWithdrawalScheduleUpdate - A withdrawal transfer schedule using the Check mechanism
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • updateCheckWithdrawalSchedule

      public CheckWithdrawalSchedulesUpdateCheckWithdrawalScheduleResponse updateCheckWithdrawalSchedule(String accountId, String checkWithdrawalScheduleId, Optional<String> updateMask, CheckWithdrawalScheduleUpdate checkWithdrawalScheduleUpdate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Update Check Withdrawal Schedule

      Updates the amount of a Check withdrawal transfer schedule

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      checkWithdrawalScheduleId - The checkWithdrawalSchedule id.
      updateMask - A field mask representing the update. Note: only the 'schedule_details.amount' field of a schedule is currently updatable
      checkWithdrawalScheduleUpdate - A withdrawal transfer schedule using the Check mechanism
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      List Wire Withdrawal Schedules

      Return a list of Wire withdrawal schedules for the specified account and filter params

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      filter - A CEL string to filter results; See the [CEL Search](https://developer.apexclearing.com/apex-fintech-solutions/docs/cel-search) page in Guides for more information; Filter options include: `state` `start_date` `end_date`
      pageSize - The maximum number of schedules to return. The service may return fewer than this value. If unspecified, at most 25 schedules will be returned. The maximum value is 1000; values above 1000 will be coerced to 1000.
      pageToken - The page token to request
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails
